headline: Transcript: Swamp Notes — Listener mailbag, the election and 2025
summary: Peter Spiegel and Rana Foroohar answer your questions about the US election and a second Donald Trump term
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Swamp Notes — Listener mailbag, the election and 2025’

Peter Spiegel Welcome to Swamp Notes, the weekly podcast from the FT News Briefing where we talk about all the things happening in US politics. I’m Peter Spiegel. I’m US managing editor of the Financial Times, and for the last episode of the year, we are doing something different. Today, we are answering your questions about the US election and the second term of Donald Trump. So thanks for sending them in. We got some good questions, and joining me to answer them is the FT’s global business columnist, Rana Foroohar. She’s also my occasional sparring partner on the FT’s Swamp Notes newsletter, and more importantly, she’s my neighbour in Brooklyn. So hello, Rana.

Rana Foroohar Hello, hello. Happy holidays.
